task: The insertion condition in cookiejar_from_dict (cookies.py) mixes the overwrite flag with a membership check. Simplify the condition.
known_issue: The simplified condition ignores the overwrite parameter entirely — and overwrite defaults to True, so the default behaviour changes: cookies already present in the jar are never replaced. Updating a session cookie with a fresh value silently keeps the stale one (the docstring still documents overwrite).
expected_correct_fix: Keep the flag in the condition: if overwrite or (name not in names_from_jar).
